Field Properties
Document Settings

These become the defaults embedded in every compiled document. Users can still override them via the in-document Settings panel.

Layout
20px
Typography
14px
Date & Time
Theme

Pre-validated palettes meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 normal text, 3:1 UI) in both dark and light modes. Click to apply, then fine-tune with the color pickers below.

100%
Form Fields
Tables
Editor History

Controls the Studio's undo/redo snapshot behaviour.

Accessibility

Select the compliance standard applied when compiling documents. Determines which ARIA structures, skip-nav, landmark roles, and field annotations are emitted. "None" produces standard HTML labels only.

Studio Theme

Customize the Studio editor appearance. These settings apply only to the Studio itself.

Dark Theme
100%

  Ready
  








',

    // runtime
    '',

    '',
    ''
  ].filter(function(s) { return s !== ''; }).join('\n');

  return html;
};

// ---- entry (fallback) ----
var _parser   = new TesselParser();
var _compiler = new TesselCompiler({ css: TESSEL_CSS, runtime: TESSEL_RUNTIME_JS, fields: TesselFields });
var Tessel_api = {
  version: "0.1.0",
  parse:      function(src){ return _parser.parse(src); },
  compile:    function(src){ return _compiler.compile(_parser.parse(src)); },
  compileAst: function(ast){ return _compiler.compile(ast); },
  Parser: TesselParser, Compiler: TesselCompiler, Fields: TesselFields
};

return Tessel_api || { version:"0.1.0", parse:parse, compile:compile, compileAst:compileAst, Parser:TesselParser, Compiler:TesselCompiler, Fields:TesselFields };
});
